rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Receiver Kevin Singers Final Report And Account, Notice Of Motion, And Motion For Issuance Of Order: 1. Approving And Settling Receivers Final Report And Account 2. Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs Incurred By Receiver And Professionals 3. Directing Disbursement Of Remaining Receivership Estate Funds 4. Directing Clerk Of Court To Release Funds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep. 13, 2022 line 1. Receiver Kevin Singer's Final Report And Account; Motion For Issuance Of Order: 1. Approving And Settling Receivers Final Report And Account 2. Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs Incurred By Receiver And Professionals 3. Directing Disbursement Of Remaining Receivership Estate Funds 4. Directing Clerk Of Court To Release Funds Status Report. The Court intends to approve the report and accounts submitted by the Receiver to date. However, in light of the pending litigations involving the receiver and the case law requiring/authorizing the receiver to be paid out of the receivership estate, the receivership will remain in place. Receiver to prepare an order reflecting the Court's ruling. = (501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: DAVID BARTEL VS. 2046 FILBERT, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep. 13, 2022 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL, INC. and JOHN KIRKPATRICK's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to the pre-judgment interest. No opposition. Motion is otherwise denied. Moving party failed to show that CC 3343 is applicable to the case at bar ("one defrauded in the purchase").= (501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
